summary: Dashboard Story-First Experience Testing Complete. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 8 UI components verified via Playwright. The dashboard transformation from tool grid to story-first experience is working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 when user has no completed jobs - this is expected behavior but generates console warnings

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard correctly implements story-first experience with Hero section at top
Story Feed API returns all required fields: hero (with hook_text, thumbnail_url), trending (12 stories), characters (list), live_stats
Universal prompt bar with suggestion chips works correctly - chips update input field on click
More Tools section is properly demoted to bottom and collapsed by default
All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented for testing
Live stats show real-time counts: total_stories, stories_today, total_continuations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard story-first experience testing complete. Key findings: (1) GET /api/engagement/story-feed returns hero, trending (up to 12), characters, live_stats. (2) Hero section shows featured story with hook_text and Continue This Story / Create Your Version buttons. (3) Universal prompt bar has input, Create Story button, and 4 suggestion chips. (4) Live stats show 59 total stories, 0 today, 0 continuations. (5) Trending stories grid shows 8 cards with R2 thumbnails and Continue Story buttons. (6) Character universe shows 4 characters (Luna, Finn, Zara, Alex) with initial avatars. (7) Credits card shows balance with Get More Credits button. (8) More Tools section is collapsed by default, expands to show 10 tools. (9) Story-first layout confirmed: Hero at y<200, More Tools at y=1595.

Backend_Test_1_Story_Feed_API.details: GET /api/engagement/story-feed returns 200 with hero (hook_text, thumbnail_url), trending (12 stories), characters (list), live_stats (stories_today, total_stories, total_continuations)

Frontend_Test_1_Hero_Section.details: data-testid='hero-section' visible with 'CONTINUE THIS STORY' label, 'Continue This Story' button, 'Create Your Version' button

Frontend_Test_2_Universal_Prompt_Bar.details: data-testid='universal-prompt' with input and 'Create Story' button. 4 suggestion chips visible and functional

Frontend_Test_3_Live_Stats.details: data-testid='live-stats' showing 59 stories created, 0 today, 0 continuations

Frontend_Test_4_Trending_Stories.details: data-testid='trending-stories' section with 8 story-card elements, each having thumbnails, hook text, and 'Continue Story' button

Frontend_Test_5_Character_Universe.details: data-testid='character-universe' section showing 4 character cards (Luna, Finn, Zara, Alex) with names

Frontend_Test_6_Credits_Card.details: data-testid='credits-card' showing credit count and 'Get More Credits' button

Frontend_Test_7_More_Tools.details: data-testid='more-tools' section collapsed by default. Click toggle shows 10 tools in grid

Frontend_Test_8_No_Blank_Screens.details: No blank screens, no errors, tool grid is NOT primary UI - story-first experience confirmed

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. Story feed, engagement dashboard, and credits endpoints all working.
